topics.title: Entertainment News and Pop Culture Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including a potential chess match with a local personality, the health concerns of a recurring guest, an upcoming Jackass film, and reports regarding Tom Cruise's relationship with Paramount Pictures.

topics.title: Show Business Contracts and Celebrity Reputation
topics.summary: The show examines the risks of high-profile contracts, citing examples like Chevy Chase and Tom Cruise to illustrate how corporations may turn on talent after achieving success.

topics.title: Relationship Dynamics and Late Night Television Preparation
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of romantic relationships, the impact of public image on personal life, and the preparation process for an upcoming appearance on late-night television.

topics.title: Late Night Talk Show Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio discusses the nuances of hosting late-night talk shows, including guest interactions, the timing of comedy bits, and the personal dynamics involved in conducting interviews with family members.

topics.title: Father-Son Relationship Dynamics
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding a listener's complicated relationship with his father, transitioning into a debate about personal boundaries and expectations in family dynamics.

topics.title: Elijah Blue's Life and Recovery
topics.summary: The studio features Elijah Blue discussing his upbringing with Cher, his experiences with addiction and recovery, and his perspective on the music industry.

topics.title: Musical Legacy and Personal Reflections
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding past relationships, the impact of fame on personal identity, and the performance of an original track titled "Carrying Over."

topics.title: Elijah Blue Interview and New Music
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with Elijah Blue regarding his new album, the origins of his band name Deji, his personal history with Val Kilmer, and the current state of the music industry.

topics.title: Joan Rivers Discusses Aging and Career
topics.summary: The studio features Joan Rivers discussing her upcoming television show, her experiences with aging, and various personal anecdotes regarding her lifestyle and relationships.

topics.title: Joan Rivers and Upcoming Media Appearances
topics.summary: The show features discussions regarding Joan Rivers' upcoming appearance on the TV Guide red carpet, the career of John Hansen, and various comedic segments including a parody song by Reverend Bob Levy.

topics.title: Radio Show Production and Prank Calls
topics.summary: The studio explores the production of a prank call segment involving a man obsessed with weather, followed by a humorous interaction with a psychic hotline.

topics.title: Radio Show Segment and News Update
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including prank calls, discussions on celebrity news involving Artie Lange and Richard Christie, and a preview of upcoming stories from the Howard 100 News team.

topics.title: Tom Cruise and Viacom Partnership Dissolution
topics.summary: The studio discusses the reported end of Tom Cruise's long-standing relationship with Viacom, highlighting reports of his unprofessional behavior and the public nature of the corporate fallout.

topics.title: Tom Cruise and Political News
topics.summary: The studio discusses Tom Cruise's move to start his own production company, the legal status of John Mark Carr in a kidnapping case, and various political headlines including Senator John McCain's comments on the Iraq War.

topics.title: Radio Show Preparation and Guest Logistics
topics.summary: The studio prepares for an upcoming broadcast featuring guest Johnny Frato, while discussing various stories including celebrity rumors, local news, and upcoming comedy tours.
